title: The Pitfalls of Overfitting in Time Series Modeling
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative modeling process, the trade-off between model complexity and generalizability, and the resulting outcomes of overfit vs. well-fit models.
relationships: Model Training Process fits both a Complex Model and a Simple Model to the In-Sample Data
Complex Model achieves a very low error on In-Sample Data but a high error on Out-of-Sample Data
Simple Model achieves a higher error on In-Sample Data but a lower, more consistent error on Out-of-Sample Data
This demonstrates that the Complex Model has Overfit the noise in the training data and fails to generalize
